title: AI Polaroid Memory
description: Turns a photo into a nostalgic instant-film memory.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a nostalgic instant-film snapshot. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, pose, camera angle, framing, clothing colors, and scene context. Use a natural candid feel, soft flash falloff, slightly faded colors, gentle film imperfections, warm paper texture, and a clean white instant-photo border without readable writing.
negative_prompt: readable text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, harsh HDR, oversharpening, digital artifacts, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. summer vacation snapshot, faded instant film...
